title: Cobblemon SoundPack 8bit KDS
description:
ResourcePack que muda o som do mod cobblemon para musicas 8 bit batalha e sons ambiente.

ResourcePack that changes the sound of the cobblemon mod to 8 bit battle music and ambient sounds.
body:
ResourcePack that changes the sound of the cobblemon mod to 8 bit battle music and ambient sounds.

ResourcePack que muda o som do mod cobblemon para músicas 8 bit batalha e sons ambiente.

This is a sound set I got from the internet and from cobblemon resource packs from other creators.
